title: Query Optimization Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on database query optimization concepts.

questions.question: What is the primary role of query optimization?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database server and queries
To identify and improve the efficiency of slow-performing database queries

questions.question: Which of these is a key metric to monitor for database performance?
Regarding query optimization, which tool is best to use to see exactly how a database executes a query?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
